subject: Explore Circuit installation/setup UX options now that the Claude Code plugin may delegate to an external circuit-next binary. Compare self-contained plugin, plugin plus separate CLI install, npm-packaged CLI dependency, bootstrap installer, and development-only wrapper paths.
